nodes.name: manifest.yaml (ux-design-kit meta-skill)

nodes.name: SKILL.md (ux-design-kit)

nodes.name: bundle.yaml (web-dev-kit)
nodes.summary: Bundle manifest for the Web Dev Kit, grouping frontend and backend web development skills including Astro, async patterns, and API design.

nodes.name: manifest.yaml (web-dev-kit meta-skill)
nodes.summary: Skill manifest for the Web Dev Kit meta-skill, defining triggers for web development tasks across frontend and backend.

nodes.name: SKILL.md (web-dev-kit)
nodes.summary: Skill documentation for the Web Dev Kit meta-skill, covering frontend patterns, API design, async handling, and full-stack web development.

nodes.name: bundle.yaml (windows-kit)
nodes.summary: Bundle manifest for the Windows Kit, grouping skills for Windows-specific development including PowerShell and Windows APIs.

nodes.name: manifest.yaml (windows-kit meta-skill)
nodes.summary: Skill manifest for the Windows Kit meta-skill, defining triggers for Windows platform development tasks.

nodes.name: SKILL.md (windows-kit)
nodes.summary: Skill documentation for the Windows Kit meta-skill, covering Windows-specific development, PowerShell scripting, and Windows API usage.

nodes.name: mcp-servers.yaml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive catalog of MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers available for Claude Code, listing server configurations and capabilities.

nodes.name: README.md (catalog)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the catalog directory, explaining the purpose and structure of the MCP server catalog.

nodes.name: debug_test.py
nodes.summary: Debug test script for the Archon framework, providing test cases and validation utilities for debugging purposes.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml (file-ops-rs)
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the file-ops-rs Rust binary, declaring dependencies and build configuration for the file operations utility.

nodes.name: main.rs (file-ops-rs)
nodes.summary: Rust binary entry point for the file-ops-rs utility, implementing high-performance file operations for the Archon framework.

nodes.name: __init__.py (hooks/claude)
nodes.summary: Package initializer for the hooks/claude Python package, enabling module imports within the hook system.

nodes.name: __init__.py (hooks/claude/shared)
nodes.summary: Package initializer for the hooks/claude/shared Python subpackage containing shared utilities for hook scripts.

nodes.name: agent_roles.py
nodes.summary: Defines agent role definitions and context slice configurations injected by the SubagentStart hook to provide role-specific context to spawned agents.

nodes.name: hooks.yaml
nodes.summary: YAML configuration for the hooks pipeline system, defining hook event types, triggers, and script mappings for pipeline execution.

nodes.name: on_deviation.py
nodes.summary: Hook script triggered when an agent deviates from expected behavior, implementing the STOP-DOCUMENT-ASK-LOG deviation protocol.

nodes.name: on_failure.py
nodes.summary: Hook script triggered on pipeline step failure, logging errors and triggering failure escalation or retry protocols.

nodes.name: post_step.py
nodes.summary: Post-step hook script for pipeline execution, validating step outputs, updating pipeline state, and tracking file changes after each step.

nodes.name: pre_step.py
nodes.summary: Pre-step hook script for pipeline execution, validating preconditions, injecting context, and enforcing available-when conditions before each step.

nodes.name: session_start.py (hooks)
nodes.summary: Session start hook for the pipeline system, initializing pipeline session state and setting up tracking variables at the start of execution.

nodes.name: integration_test.py
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for the Archon framework, testing cross-component interactions between the CLI, registry, pipeline engine, and hook system.

nodes.name: pipeline.yaml (design)
nodes.summary: Pipeline definition for the design workflow, orchestrating design research, wireframing, and handoff steps through the Archon pipeline engine.

nodes.name: batch-upgrade-stubs.py
nodes.summary: Large Python script for batch-upgrading skill stub files across the Archon framework, processing skill manifests and SKILL.md files in bulk.
